milestones.title: Architecture Complete
milestones.description: System architecture finalized, tech stack approved, and design documents signed off by all stakeholders.

milestones.title: Core API Launch
milestones.description: RESTful API endpoints deployed to staging with full CRUD operations and authentication integration.

milestones.title: Beta Release
milestones.description: Limited beta release to 50 internal users for feedback collection and usability validation.

milestones.title: Security Audit
milestones.description: Third-party penetration testing and internal security review of all API endpoints and data flows.

milestones.title: GA Release
milestones.description: General availability release to all customers with full documentation and support readiness.

milestones.title: Performance Optimization
milestones.description: Query optimization, caching layer implementation, and CDN configuration for sub-200ms response times.

shipped.title: User Authentication Module
shipped.description: OAuth 2.0 and SAML-based authentication with MFA support, session management, and role-based access control.

shipped.title: Real-time Dashboard Analytics
shipped.description: Live-updating analytics dashboard with customizable widgets, date range filters, and CSV export capability.

shipped.title: CI/CD Pipeline Automation
shipped.description: Automated build, test, and deployment pipeline with staging environment promotion and rollback support.

shipped.title: Onboarding Wizard Redesign
shipped.description: Streamlined 3-step onboarding flow reducing new user setup time from 15 minutes to under 3 minutes.

inProgress.title: API Rate Limiting
inProgress.description: Token bucket rate limiting with configurable thresholds per API key tier and graceful degradation responses.

inProgress.title: Data Export Module
inProgress.description: Bulk data export in JSON, CSV, and PDF formats with scheduled export support and email delivery.

inProgress.title: Mobile Responsive Layout
inProgress.description: Adaptive layout for tablet and mobile viewports with touch-optimized navigation and gesture support.

carriedOver.title: Automated Regression Suite
carriedOver.description: End-to-end regression test suite covering all critical user journeys with nightly execution and Slack reporting.
carriedOver.reason: Blocked by test infrastructure migration to new CI environment

carriedOver.title: Third-party SSO Integration
carriedOver.description: Single sign-on integration with Okta, Azure AD, and Google Workspace for enterprise customer onboarding.
carriedOver.reason: Vendor API breaking changes required contract renegotiation
